mapper.update: UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar_id = #{avatarId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teachers (teacher_id, name, title, department, bio) VALUES (#{teacherId}, #{name}, #{title}, #{department}, #{bio})
INSERT INTO students (student_id, name, student_number, major, grade, class) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{name}, #{studentNumber}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{clazz})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET name = #{name}, student_number = #{studentNumber}, major = #{major}, grade = #{grade}, class = #{clazz} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
